title: Elbaf’s Past Turns Violent
description: On pages 10–12, this part follows Unknown person #9, Unknown person #10, Nami, World Government, Unknown person #11, Rocks D. Xebec as Elbaf’s history turns darker as older conflicts, powerful bloodlines, and the roots of hatred behind the present crisis come into focus.
scene: Elbaf’s history turns darker as older conflicts, powerful bloodlines, and the roots of hatred behind the present crisis come into focus.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I've never seen this much loot before!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Like we'd let the Roger Pirates get away with all this!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Drive the pirates off the island!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Nothing makes sense here... even justice...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: God Valley is not a member nation...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even if I only manage one more, I'm gonna...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...Save as many of these people as I can!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well... things have continued to unfold outside of our expectations.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All this intense destruction... I believe if it continues...

summary: This part advances Elbaf’s Violent Past through 32 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
